turns.speaker: D
turns.text: kayla ward , date of birth , 4/28/07 . mrn 3-8-4-9-2-0 . kayla ward is here for a new visit with kayla ward's mother for acne located on the face , which started about two years ago and is present most every day . kayla ward has been using persa-gel and washing regularly , which is somewhat helpful . there are no associated symptoms including itching , bleeding , or pain . no additional past medical history . kayla ward lives with kayla ward's parents and sister . kayla ward's parents have a dog , bird , and bunnies . kayla ward is in 7th grade . kayla ward plays basketball and volleyball and tap . kayla ward wears sunscreen in the summer , spf 30 . no additional family history . hi kayla , i'm dr. juan price . dr. juan price hears kayla ward is starting to get some acne on the face . how about the chest and back ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the acne is not too bad .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , the acne is not bad on the chest or back . kayla ward has used some over the counter items like washes and persa-gel ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: do the over the counter items like washes and persa-gel seem to be helping ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , kayla ward thinks the over the counter items like washes and persa-gel are helping , a little bit .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . what's kayla ward's skin care routine like now ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: does dr. juan price wan na know , like , the things kayla ward currently uses ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yes . what does kayla ward do for kayla ward's acne in the morning ? and then what does kayla ward do at nighttime ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: kayla ward washes kayla ward's face , more like kayla ward wipes kayla ward's face down in the morning . then at night kayla ward uses an elf facial cleanser called the super clarity cleanser . kayla ward finishes with a toner and then the persa-gel .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: when dr. juan price says , " wipe kayla ward's face in the morning , " does kayla ward use a product or just water ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm , just water and a washcloth , really . if kayla ward feels really greasy , sometimes kayla ward will use the elf cleanser in the morning , too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and is today a good day , bad day , or an average day for kayla ward ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm , kayla ward would say today is probably a good day for kayla ward , of course , since kayla ward is here , right ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: acne is always good when kayla ward comes to see the doctor . does kayla ward find that kayla ward's acne flares with kayla ward's periods ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , not really .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and does kayla ward get a regular period ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yup .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how long has kayla ward been getting a regular period ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm , kayla ward thinks about two years .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . [patient_guest] the biggest flare , probably , was when kayla ward started school sports in the fall , just with all the sweating . yup , that will do it . is there anything else that dr. juan price has noticed , mrs. ward ? [patient_guest] no . kayla ward really has been doing a good job with the facial care regimen . the facial care regimen just does n't seem to help as much as mrs. ward wanted . got it . okay . well , let's take a look then . full exam is performed today , except for under the underwear and under the bra . multiple benign nevi on the trunk and extremities . scattered skin colored papules . open and closed comedones . and erythmateous papules on the face , primarily on the forehead and with also some on the central cheeks and chin . the chest and back are relatively spared . and the remainder of the examination is normal . so , what dr. juan price is seeing from kayla ward's exam today is mild to moderate acne , mostly comodonal with small inflammatory component .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , so is there anything kayla ward and mrs. ward can do to help the acne ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yes . dr. juan price would like to start with a topical therapy first . every morning , kayla ward will wash kayla ward's face with a mild cleanser then use a moisturizer labeled , " noncomedogenic , " with sunscreen spf 30 or higher . this means the moisturizer labeled " noncomedogenic " wo n't clog kayla ward's pores . now , in the evening , kayla ward will wash kayla ward's face with the same cleanser and allow kayla ward's face to dry . kayla ward will apply adapalene , 0.1 % cream , in a thin layer to the areas kayla ward generally gets acne . dr. juan price wants kayla ward to start off using adapalene 0.1% cream a few nights a week and slowly work up to using adapalene 0.1% cream every night . if adapalene 0.1% cream is ... excuse me , if adapalene 0.1% cream is very expensive or not covered by insurance , kayla ward can try a different gel over the counter . kayla ward can follow adapalene 0.1% cream with clean and clear persa-gel in a thin layer , or where kayla ward generally gets acne . and then a noncomedogenic moisturizer . kayla ward's atopic retinoid will cause some sensitivity , so kayla ward will need to wear sunscreen when kayla ward is outside . the atopic retinoid may also cause some dryness or irritation .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , kayla ward can do that .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: kayla ward also has multiple benign moles on kayla ward's arms , legs , back and abdomen . this means the multiple benign moles all look normal with no worrisome features . dr. juan price will see if kayla ward has any progress over the next six months and follow up at that time .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , that sounds good . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does kayla ward have any questions for dr. juan price ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , kayla ward do n't think so .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . if kayla ward has questions or concerns before kayla ward's next visit , please call the office .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank you , doctor , kayla ward and mrs. ward will .
